name: MoneyGram
description_short: Mesa, AZ's MoneyGram location at 5122 E University Dr offers check cashing and money transfer services seven days a week.
description_long:
The MoneyGram location at 5122 E University Drive in Mesa, Arizona operates as a standalone check-cashing store, serving the East Mesa community. The branch is open seven days a week from 7 AM to 9 PM, making it convenient for early morning or evening transactions. This accessible location on University Drive makes it an easy stop for residents and visitors needing check-cashing services in Mesa.

At this Mesa location, you can cash checks, send money transfers, and access other financial services. The staff can answer specific questions about fees, limits, and available payment methods. Call +1 480-832-9484 to confirm services before visiting or to get information on current rates.

If you're a Mesa, AZ resident needing a check cashed or money sent quickly, bring a valid photo ID and your documents. The extended hours mean you can visit before or after work. MoneyGram provides fast, reliable money transfer and check-cashing options at this convenient University Drive location.
pros: Extensive network of 23+ locations in Mesa with convenient partner retailers including Walmart and CVS
Extended hours of operation, with many locations open until 8-10 PM for customer convenience
Hybrid service model allowing both online and offline transaction management
Multiple agent types (major retailers, check-cashing stores) providing accessibility options
Established brand with global money transfer capabilities for international remittances
Same-day or next-day transfer options available at most locations
cons: Fees for money transfers can be significant, particularly for international remittances
Exchange rates for international transfers may be less favorable than digital alternatives like Wise or OFX
Reliance on third-party agent locations means service quality and hours vary by partner
No direct MoneyGram-branded physical locations; customers must visit partner retailers
Limited transparency on pricing from location search page, requiring calls or in-person visits
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who need convenient money transfer services
Individuals sending remittances to family members domestically or internationally
Customers who prefer in-person service and immediate cash pickup over digital-only platforms
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and families sending remittances who value convenience and in-person service over competitive pricing. The main caveat is that fees and exchange rates are typically higher than modern digital transfer alternatives, making it most suitable for customers prioritizing accessibility and immediate service over cost optimization.
services: Domestic money transfers within the United States
Online money transfer initiation and tracking
In-person cash pickup at partner locations
Money receiving services from international senders
meta_description: Mesa, AZ: MoneyGram at 5122 E University Dr offers check cashing and money transfers daily 7AM-9PM.
